collection.name: Digital Epigraphy and Archaeology database
collection.description: Browse the entire database of the Digital Epigraphy and Archaeology project.

collection.name: Epidaurica
collection.description: A collection of inscriptions from Epidaurus.

collection.name: Tampa Museum of Art
collection.description: This collection contains archaeological exhibits from the Tampa Museum of Art.

collection.name: The National Archives
collection.description: Digitized exhibits from The National Archives [UK].

collection.name: Monumentum Ancyranum
collection.description: A collection of fragments from the Res Gestae Divi Augusti inscription from Monumentum Ancyranum.

collection.name: Abraham Lincoln
collection.description: A collection of digitized embossments from manuscripts of Abraham Lincoln.

collection.name: Aleshire
collection.description: Squeezes from the Aleshire collection housed in UC Berkeley.

collection.name: Nemea
collection.description: A collection of inscriptions from the archaeological excavations in Nemea.

collection.name: Palazzo Altemps
collection.description: A collection of digitized statues from Palazzo Altemps.
